header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: General orchestrator configuration.
maxReviewLoopsHelp: Maximum times the QA Gate can request fixes before escalating
scopeGuard.title: Scope Guard Limits
scopeGuard.description: Thresholds that trigger automatic rollback when a fix exceeds expected scope.
scopeGuard.testTimeoutHelp: Tests that timeout are treated as warnings, not failures. Only explicit test failures trigger rollback.
scopeGuard.testFixRetriesHelp: How many times Claude can attempt to fix failing tests before pausing for manual intervention.
healthCheck.title: Health Check
data.title: Data
data.clearLogsDesc: Deletes all activity records. This action cannot be undone.
env.title: Environment
env.qualityGateValue: IA Review → loop until Ready to merge
